AttributeDefinition.name: uid
AttributeDefinition.Description: User identifier - unique login name for the user account

AttributeDefinition.name: dn
AttributeDefinition.Description: Distinguished name - unique identifier representing the full path to the LDAP object

AttributeDefinition.name: employeeNumber
AttributeDefinition.Description: Employee number - unique numeric identifier assigned to the employee

AttributeDefinition.name: mail
AttributeDefinition.Description: Email address - primary email contact for the user

AttributeDefinition.name: cn
AttributeDefinition.Description: Common name - full display name of the user

AttributeDefinition.name: givenName
AttributeDefinition.Description: Given name - first name of the user

AttributeDefinition.name: sn
AttributeDefinition.Description: Surname - last name of the user

AttributeDefinition.name: ou
AttributeDefinition.Description: Organizational unit - department or organizational division of the user

AttributeDefinition.name: employeeType
AttributeDefinition.Description: Employee type - classification of employee status (e.g., full-time, contractor, temporary)

AttributeDefinition.name: uniqueUid
AttributeDefinition.Description: AT-LDAP ID - In WorkdayID@companyCode format or LEGACYNAME@companyCode format
